items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Measure S Bond Program Priorities: HVAC Discussion
Discussion on Budget Renewal Initiative
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the August 28 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Illustrative Math for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Local Interagency Agreement(s) to Provide Education and Training to Credential and License Candidates
Approval of Agreement between the Redwood City School District and JTG2023 for the 2024-2025 School Year
Ratification of Warrant Register, August 1, 2024 - August 31, 2024
Adoption of Resolution No. 4, Approval of Education Code and Title V Options for Teaching Assignments 2024-2025 School Year
Adoption of Resolution No. 5, Resolution in favor of California Proposition 2, Public School Facilities Bond Measure
Second Reading and Approval of Board Bylaw 9223 - Filling Vacancies
Approval of Response to the 2023-2024 Grand Jury Report: "Assessing and Reporting Internal Controls in San Mateo County Agencies and School Districts"
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
2024-25 Adopted Budget & LCAP for Connect Community Charter School and RCSD's Fiscal Oversight Review Letter
2024-25 Adopted Budget & LCAP for Rocketship Redwood City and RCSD's Fiscal Oversight Review Letter
2024-25 Adopted Budget & LCAP for KIPP Excelencia Community Prep Charter School and RCSD's Fiscal Oversight Review Letter Information
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The board president asked 'do we have any changes to the agenda' and proceeded directly to a motion to approve the agenda without identifying any pulled items, reorders, or additions.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: we are on consent calendar make a motion to approve I'll second all those in favor I thank you
